    Research Scientist

    Projects

    Naver Cloud, Seongnam, Korea

    Sep 2024 - Feb 2026
    Development of large-scale TTS model for zero-shot voice cloning
      • Role: Management, research and development of DNN TTS models

    Nov 2022 - Feb 2026
    Development of high-quality TTS api for cloud services
      • Role: Management, research and development of DNN TTS models
      • Related services
         · Clova Voice Pro

    May 2022 - Oct 2023
    Development of automatic TTS modeling with smartphone recordings
      • Role: Management, research and development of DNN TTS models
      • Related services
         · Voice Maker

    Naver Corp., Seongnam, Korea

    Mar 2017 - Dec 2022
    Hybrid TTS combining deep learning and unit-selection models
      • Role: Management, research and development of DNN TTS models
      • Related services
         · Showhost voice for Naver Shopping, May 2021 - Dec 2022
         · Representative voice for Clova Contact Center, May 2019 - Dec 2022
         · Navigation voice for Naver Map, Jan 2019 - Sep 2020
         · Sangjin Oh’s (Korean newscaster) voice for Naver News, Oct 2019 - May 2020
         · In-Na Yoo’s (Korean actress) voice for Clova AI speaker, Apr 2018 - Dec 2018

    Sep 2021 - May 2022
    TTS-based audiobook generation
      • Role: Development of audiobook generation tool
      • Related services
         · Clova Dubbing x Inmun 360

    Yonsei University, Seoul, Korea

    Nov 2016 - Mar 2017
    Development of Glottal DNN vocoder for speech synthesis systems
      • Naver Corp., Korea
      • Role: Research and development of Glottal DNN vocoder for DNN-based TTS systems

    Mar 2015 - Feb 2016
    Deep neural network-based speaker-adaptive text-to-speech
      • ReadSpeaker (Voiceware), Korea
      • Role: Research and development of DNN-based TTS acoustic models

    Jun 2015 - Aug 2015
    Low bit-rate speech codec
      • Line Corp., Korea
      • Role: Implementation of low bit-rate MELP codec

    Mar 2014 - Feb 2015
    Statistical parametric speech synthesis
      • ReadSpeaker (Voiceware), Korea
      • Role: Research and development of parametric vocoder for DNN-based TTS systems

    Feb 2012 - Dec 2014
    Multi-model bio interface and recognition
      • Samsung Electronics, Korea
      • Role: Research and development of speech enhancement for pathological voices

    Nov 2013 - Jun 2014
    Waveform generation for statistical parametric speech synthesis
      • Microsoft Research, Korea
      • Role: Research and development of DNN-based TTS models

    Aug 2011 - Jan 2012
    Fixed point implementation of MPEG-D USAC decoder
      • LG Electronics, Korea
      • Role: Fixed-point implementation
